features: 【1A:1B BY VOLUME, MEANS NO SCALE NEEDED AT ALL】no scale needed, this silicone mold making kit comes with 2 bottles, 70.55 Oz / 4.4 Lbs kit, part A 35.275 Oz/2.2 lbs, part B 35.275 Oz/2.2 lbs, very easy to use and and beginner frinedly silicone mold making pack with a tool kit: including 10 pcs of gloves, 5 pcs of wood mixing sticks and 1 informative and helpful user manual;

【SELF-DEGASSING, REAL BUBBLE FREE】this BBDINO liquid silicone for mold making is specially designed for all kinds of silicone molds making, it has very low viscosity so that you can easily mix and pour the silicone, the bubbles will rise and break by itself quickly if you give enough time for it at room temperature. The result made by this silicone rubber mold making kit has excellent flexibility and strength, very easy to demold, perfect for making both 3D and flat silicne molds;

【WORKING TIME: 30 MINUTES, CURE TIME: 4 HOURS AT ROOM TEMPERTUARE 25℃(73.4℉)】This pourable silicone for mold making rubber cures at room temperature with negligible shrinkage, heat cure will shorten the cure time if you are a experienced silicone mold maker, but would suggest to use a vacuum chamber pot of heating up to cure to achieve best result. WATER-LIKE SMOOTH, MEANS EASY POURING AND CATCHES EVERY TINY DETAILS!

【PERFECT FOOD MOLDS MAKING AND 3D SILCIONE MOLDS MAKING】BBDINO mold making silicone is a platinum grade food safe silicone mold making kit, which is widely used for mold making of arts crafts, like casting Resins, Wax, Gypsum, Concrete, Soap, Candle and also can be used as Molds Making for Candy, Chocolate, Cake and Ice Cubes

【LONG SHELF LIFE & VIVID COLOR】Our mold making silicone rubber has a very long shelf life of over 1 year, you can easy save the rest materials for next time using by cover the cap back, no waste at all, and this silicone mold making kit for resin casting is designed with a stunning Jade Green Color, you can easily see whether part A and B mixed evenly enough and also you will make your arts and molds in a unique and beautiful Jade-look Color!
description: Product Description BBDINO Super Elastic Platinum Silicone Mould Making Kits BBDINO Super Elastic Silicone Mold Making Rubber is a high grade of Platinum Cure silicone, a real good choice for mold makers who care about safety, environment and fine finished products, as a platinum silicone, it is: 100 % Non-toxic; Real Zero odor; Eco-friend; Characteristics: ●Easy processing: The low viscosity allows a bubble-free mixing and easy pouring without a vacuum chamber. The flowability also reliably captures fine details. ●Low material loss: The product hardens at room temperature and has a long shelf life of over 12 months with proper storage. Opened containers can be resealable. ●Food safe and safe: The silicone is odourless, non-toxic, food-safe (when used properly) and is suitable for applications in the field of confectionery and food production. ●Wide applications: Ideal for the production of molds for casting resin, epoxy resin, wax, soap, gypsum, concrete as well as for artistic projects and industrial applications. ●Packaging: Aluminum-sealed bottles prevent leakage and ensure long product freshness. Note: At higher ambient temperatures, the processing and curing time is reduced accordingly. For particularly complex or larger molds, the use of suitable mixing tools is recommended. Summary: The BBDINO Super Elastic liquid silicone offers a reliable, easy-to-process solution for the production of high-precision casting molds. Due to its platinum crosslinking, low viscosity and food-safe properties, it is equally suitable for creative projects and professional applications. Previous page Wide Application BBDINO Super Elastic silicone is widely used for epoxy resin, plaster, clay, wax, soap, chocolate... 1A:1B By Volume or Weight as you like Special formulated, mix the silicone 1A:1B either by Volume or by Weight, at your convenience. Self Degassing No need vacuum chamber, real bubble free, silky and smooth to capture all the details on the master. 5 Hrs Quick Cure BBDINO Super Elastic silicone has 30 mins working time and 5 hrs quick cure at room temp. Thrilling Detail Copy by BBDINO Silicone Thrilling detail copy by BBDINO Super Elastic Platinum silicone. Easily make your moulds and copies! Next page 1 Wide Application 2 Easy To Use 3 Self Degassing 4 Quick Cure 5 100 % Detail Easy Steps to Make Your Own Moulds Now! Step 1. Fetch silicone A & B Mix BBDINO super elastic liquid mould making silicone rubber 1A : 1B by volume or by weight at your convenience, different colors easy to distinguish; Step 2. Mix 2 parts evenly Stir the BBDINO Super elastic mould making silicone evenly, BBDINO silicone mould making kit is very easy to mix, self degassing, real bubble free; Step 3. Pouring the silicone Pouring the mixed mould making silicone into the mold container, working time is 30 mins and cure within 5 hrs at 73 F; Step 4. Demoulding Let the silicone set, and wait for about 5 hours at stable room temperature, demould and use the mould after 24 hours! Let's make it now! for miniature items mould making How to use BBDINO super elastic silicone rubber to make a silicone Mould This Video show you how to use BBDINO Super Elastic Silicone Mould Making Rubber to make a silicone mould for a plaster decoration item, and how to use the silicone mould to cast with plaster to make a perfect replica; This silicone is super elastic and flexible, you will be able to peel off the finished silicone mould easily, ideal for making block silicone moulds. Small Items, epoxy resin etc. Large Items, concrete etc. For silicone coloring All kinds of Mold Making Net Weight 1000g each; 2000g in total. 1000g each; 2000g in total. 1000g each; 2000g in total. 1000g each; 2000g in total. 1000g each; 2000g in total. 9 colors, 15ml for each color. 9 Different Sizes Mold Housing Platinum Grade ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Self Degassing ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Working Time 30 mins at 73F/23C 30 mins at 73F/23C 30 mins at 73F/23C 30 mins at 73F/23C 30 mins at 73F/23C Depends on Silicone Premium with Long Using Life Curing Time 5 Hours at 73F/23C 5 Hours at 73F/23C 5 Hours at 73F/23C 5 Hours at 73F/23C 5 Hours at 73F/23C Depends on Silicone Premium with Long Using Life Is this silicone safe when using and can I use the finished silicone mould/item contacting with food? Yes, this silicone is platinum grade and food contact safe, no odor when using, and also non toxic for using, you can use the finished silicone moulds contacting with food. Can I use the finished silicone mould in Oven? What temperature it can withstand? Yes, you can use the finished silicone mould/products in Oven, the max temperature it can withstand is 230C/446F; And also can be used in Freezer; How long should I mix part A and B? Normally we suggest to stir the silicone part A and B for at least 2 minutes, and remember to scrape the mixing container walls and bottom, you will have about 30 mins working time after part A and B poured together; Is this silicone finished mould/product shinny? Silicone don't differ as shiny and matt, if the project surface is shiny, then the finished silicone will be shiny, if the project surface is not shiny, then the silicone won't be shiny either. Silicone is just copying exactly what it contacted with; How would I know which silicone should I choose for my projects? It will mostly depends on the size of project you want to make, the bigger size is, the higher hardness should be; in some cases, the shape of the project also affect, highly recommend to use our Super Elastic silicone for tall or irregular shape;
